# SFSafariToolbarItem

**Class**

A proxy for a Safari app extension toolbar item in a Safari window.

## Declaration

```swift
class SFSafariToolbarItem
```

## Overview

Your app extension only uses this object when it wants to explicitly set the toolbar item state. Typically, other state changes occur automatically. Safari calls [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFSafariExtensionHandling/validateToolbarItem(in:validationHandler:)] on your app extension handler when changes, such as navigation to a webpage, could affect the state of the toolbar item.

## Controlling Toolbar Items

- **setEnabled(_:withBadgeText:)**: Sets the enabled state and the badge text for the toolbar item.
- **setBadgeText(_:)**: Sets the badge text for the toolbar item.
- **setEnabled(_:)**: Sets whether the toolbar item is enabled.
- **setImage(_:)**: Sets the image displayed in the toolbar button.
- **setLabel(_:)**

## Instance Methods

- **showPopover()**

## Contextual menu and toolbar items

- **Using contextual menu and toolbar item keys**: Learn about adding contextual menu items and toolbar items to a Safari app extension with information property list keys.
- **Adjusting settings for a toolbar item**: Customize a toolbar item for your Safari app extension.
- **Adjusting settings for contextual menu items**: Customize contextual menu items for your Safari app extension.
- **SFSafariExtensionViewController**: The view controller for a popover associated with your app extension.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCoding
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
- NSSecureCoding
